NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit
===================

The optional MRCuda module provides GPU-accelerated algorithms built with the
NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit. CUDA runtime components that ship alongside MRCuda are
redistributed under the NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit End User License Agreement (EULA),
which permits such redistribution. The EULA is not reproduced here; the
authoritative text is published by NVIDIA at:

    https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/eula/index.html

MRCuda is optional and is not present in builds compiled without CUDA support.
